phishingEmails.subject: Urgent: Verify Your Account
phishingEmails.content: Dear Customer, Your account has been suspended. Click here to verify your identity immediately. This is urgent and requires immediate action.

indicators.description: Email domain mimics PayPal (paypa1 instead of paypal)
Uses urgent language and threats of account suspension
Requests identity verification which is a common phishing tactic

phishingEmails.subject: Update Your Payment Method
phishingEmails.content: Your payment method has expired. Update it now to avoid service interruption. Click the link below.

indicators.description: Domain mimics Amazon (amaz0n with zero instead of o)
Threatens service interruption to pressure action

maliciousUrls.threatExplanation: This URL is known to be used in phishing campaigns targeting PayPal users. Domain impersonation detected.
URL uses IP address instead of domain name, which is a common phishing tactic.
indicators: URL uses IP address instead of domain

cveRecords.summary: Remote Code Execution vulnerability in popular web framework
mitigation: Update to Framework v2.6 or v3.3 or later

cveRecords.summary: SQL Injection vulnerability in database connector
mitigation: Update to Database Connector v1.6 or later
Apply principle of least privilege to database accounts
